prompts.name: Debate Topic Generator
prompts.trigger: For L2-L3 debate sessions, 2x per week
prompts.user_prompt_template: Generate a Debate Topic for Level {LEVEL}. Theme: {THEME}. Provide: topic_statement (clear proposition to argue for/against), background (2-3 sentences of context), side_a (position + 3 supporting arguments), side_b (position + 3 supporting arguments), useful_debate_phrases (10 phrases for agreeing, disagreeing, adding points), vocabulary (8 topic-specific words), rules (time limits, turn-taking, must-use phrases), judging_criteria (what makes a good argument). Return JSON.
